title: tephroseris longifolia
intro: Tephroseris longifolia, also known as the Alpine Saw-wort, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of this plant have been studied for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Tephroseris longifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Tephroseris longifolia can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
